svg.text: Whole-genome homologous inheritance context with non-homologous winners
Light-gray ribbons are grouped same-chromosome chains from father haplotypes into the child; colored ribbons are interchromosomal winners from the same 10:10 IMPG scan.
Light gray: 8183 grouped same-chromosome donor-to-child chains >=10 kb, drawn with native interval endpoints.
All tracks use native whole-genome coordinates collapsed into length-scaled chromosome-order tracks.
